sentences.arabic: طَبَخَ أَحْمَدُ الْعَدَسَ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je kuhao leću po prvi put u životu.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed cooked lentils for the first time in his life.

sentences.translation: Pročitao je recept i pažljivo pratio korake.
sentences.translationEn: He read the recipe and followed the steps carefully.

sentences.translation: Dodao je luk, bijeli luk i ulje.
sentences.translationEn: He added onion, garlic, and oil.

sentences.translation: Supa je ispala dobra i pojeo ju je radosno.
sentences.translationEn: The soup turned out good and he ate it happily.
